description: Polemical letter/responsum regarding the laws of inheritance. Looks like the hand of Avraham b. Natan Av. The layout is literary but parts of the text read like a letter, describing specific events around a specific case. The writer is appalled at "mawlāy al-meʿulle" and "al-dayyan" for how they handled the case and opposed his own authority. He rebukes them in blistering terms and refutes their claims. He (condescendingly) excuses the judge "on account of his illness."
description_he: מכתב/תשובה פולמוסית בנוגע לדיני ירושה. כנראה בכתב אברהם ב' נתן אב. הכותב נסעד כנגד הטיפול של אחרים בתיק ומפריך את טענותיהם בחריפות.
